params.name: Golden Bird
params.description: This statue was crafted from pure gold by world-class artisans using cutting-edge metallurgical techniques. Each feather was meticulously sculpted to perfectly capture the noble essence of the Birds. Its elegant and refined design embodies a discreet luxury, symbolizing the Bird's esteemed status and making it a highly coveted collectible.
